title: Exact birth date requested
rationale: An age assertion (age_over_NN / age_in_years) answers an age check without revealing the exact birth date. Requesting the full birthdate collects more than the stated purpose needs — a data-minimisation smell (GDPR Art. 5(1)(c); EUDI ARF selective disclosure).

title: Portrait requested in a remote flow
rationale: A facial portrait is biometric data. In a remote flow there is no in-person identity check to warrant it, so requesting it is usually disproportionate to the stated purpose.

title: Unique identifier requested
rationale: A document or administrative number is a stable unique identifier that lets verifiers correlate a holder across sessions and services, maximising linkability. Prefer the minimal claims that answer the purpose.

title: Entire credential requested
rationale: The request names no specific claims, so it asks for the whole credential rather than the attributes the purpose needs. Requesting everything defeats selective disclosure and collects more than necessary (GDPR Art. 5(1)(c); EUDI ARF data minimisation).
